name: tokenmaxx-board
description: Unofficial Codex ambassador scoreboard for tokens, streaks, and long-running tasks.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check scripts/profile-store.mjs && node --check scripts/update-profile.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-profile.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-profiles.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-pages.mjs && node --check .github/scripts/merge-leaderboard-submissions.mjs && npm run validate:data && node --test test/*.test.mjs
